task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses or reads the scenario files in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'ls /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios' or a script containing the path '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent writes a script to extract data, convert coordinates to DDM, and calculate Haversine distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a script (e.g., Python) with math functions for Haversine distance and logic to convert decimal degrees to degrees and decimal minutes.

task_completion.description: Verify the deck log file is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal command creating or writing to '/home/ga/Documents/deck_log.txt', or an 'ls' command showing the file exists in /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Verify the deck log contains the correctly formatted and sorted entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of 'deck_log.txt' displayed on screen showing alphabetical sorting by scenario name and the format: 'Entry No: X', 'Scenario: [Name]', 'Position: [DDM]', 'Planned Distance: [X] nm'.

task_completion.description: Verify the voyage statistics file is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal command creating or writing to '/home/ga/Documents/voyage_statistics.txt', or an 'ls' command showing the file exists in /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Verify the voyage statistics file contains the required summary table and aggregate statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of 'voyage_statistics.txt' displayed on screen showing a summary table and aggregate values for Mean Speed, Max Beaufort, Total Traffic, and Total Waypoint Distance.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uses a script to process the files rather than manually typing out the log files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a script (e.g., .py or .sh) being executed that performs file reading and parsing, rather than manual 'echo' commands of the final text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually reads the scenario files and does not hardcode the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script should contain file reading operations (e.g., open(), read(), glob) targeting the '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent does not use the Bridge Command simulator GUI, as it is a data processing task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Bridge Command 3D simulator interface is never opened or visible in the screenshots; all work is done in terminal or code editors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scenarios are located in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios. The output files must be exactly at /home/ga/Documents/deck_log.txt and /home/ga/Documents/voyage_statistics.txt. The deck log must be sorted alphabetically by scenario name. Tolerances for correctness: position minutes < 0.2, distance < 1.0 nm.
